pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x is incompatible with Java 21 and does not support the Jakarta EE namespace required by Spring Boot 3; keeping the old version would cause runtime failures or dependency resolution conflicts.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on Java 21; leaving it at 1.8 would result in compilation errors or incorrect bytecode generation for the target environment.
